name: Peppermint Stick Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix chocolate wafer crumbs and melted margarine. Press firmly onto the bottom and sides of an ungreased 9-inch pie plate.
3. Bake for 10 minutes. Remove from oven and let cool.
4. In a saucepan, heat marshmallows and milk over low heat, stirring constantly until marshmallows are melted. Remove from heat; stir in vanilla, salt, peppermint extract, and red food color. Allow mixture to cool slightly until it mounds gently when dropped from a spoon.
5. Beat whipping cream in a chilled bowl until stiff peaks form. Stir the marshmallow mix into the whipped cream until blended well. Fold in the remaining whipped cream.
6. Pour filling onto the crust. Refrigerate for at least 12 hours before serving.
7. Before serving, sprinkle with crushed peppermint candy.
